process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A simple 3-step approach to bring your project to life.

1.title: 1. Discovery Call
1.description: We discuss your project, goals, and challenges. We then propose the best strategy tailored to your needs.

2.title: 2. Commercial Proposal
2.description: You receive a detailed proposal including scope, budget, and timeline. Everything is clear, no surprises.

3.title: 3. Project Kickoff
3.description: Once approved, we set up the kickoff. You get access to your Notion workspace and work begins immediately.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions:
faq.contact_text: Other questions? Contact me directly here:

0.question: What types of clients do you support?
0.answer: We support entrepreneurs, influencer, startups and companies. Our projects range from conversion-oriented landing pages to more complete platforms (MVP, SaaS, dashboards), with an approach focused on design, solving problem, clarity of offer and performance.

1.question: How to get a quote and how long do you take to respond?
1.answer: Book a call or contact us directly on WhatsApp. We usually respond within 24h with a few quick questions and a first estimate. A detailed quote is then sent after a scoping exchange (objectives, content, deadlines, scope).

2.question: What happens if the design doesn't match your expectations?
2.answer: We move step by step with validations (creative direction, mockups, iterations). Each project includes revisions to adjust until we get a result aligned with your vision. The goal: a design that looks like you and converts.

3.question: What is the cost of a project?
3.answer: The budget depends on the scope (number of pages, features, animations, content, integrations). After a first exchange, we propose a clear recommendation with a transparent quote — no surprises.

4.question: Who is behind MC Studio?
4.answer: MC Studio brings together a team of 4 experts from different fields (product direction, design, frontend dev, backend dev and project management). Founded and led by Mohamed Chettah, the studio supports entrepreneurs, startups and companies from strategy to launch.

5.question: How does the collaboration work?
5.answer:
You will have a private WhatsApp channel with us to streamline exchanges, briefs and delivery. If needed, we schedule follow-up points.

Everything happens on Notion: you deposit your requests (text, video, docs), we analyze them and give you a deadline. In general, we deliver 2 to 3 tasks per week depending on complexity.

Once delivered, you validate or ask for revisions, then we move on to the next.

principle.title: The principle of the Partner Program.
principle.subtitle: You recommend a qualified prospect, MC Studio handles the conversations, and if the project is signed, you earn 10% of the amount.

1.title: You recommend a qualified prospect
1.text: You identify a clear need to create an application or a website and introduce us to the person (or team) in charge of the project.

2.title: MC Studio handles the conversations
2.text: We scope the need, build the proposal, lead the discussions and keep you informed of the progress.

3.title: You earn 10% if the project is signed
3.text: Once the engagement is signed and paid, you receive 10% of the ex-VAT amount of the first invoice, in a clear and documented way.

why.title: Why join the program
why.subtitle: A serious additional revenue stream, backed by a demanding studio, with a dedicated partner space to track your results.
why.side: MC Studio supports entrepreneurs, creators, startups and SMEs on high-stakes product topics. As a partner, you associate your name with a serious, committed and selective team.

income.title: Additional income
income.text: Each project signed through your recommendations generates a clear, materialised and trackable commission over time.

transparency.title: Transparency on every deal
transparency.text: You know exactly where each prospect stands: first call, proposal sent, signed, not retained. No grey area.

tracking.title: Structured tracking of your referrals
tracking.text: All your introductions are tracked, logged and linked to the corresponding projects.

monetization.title: Smart monetisation of your network
monetization.text: You create value for your network while generating income aligned with the quality of the projects you bring.

app.title: Dedicated partner app
app.text: Access to an online dashboard to record your leads, track the projects you bring and visualise your commissions.

long_term.title: Long-term relationship
long_term.text: Our goal is not one-shot deals, but building a strong and engaged network of partners.

tracking.title: A clear view of the value you create.
tracking.subtitle: Through a dedicated partner app, you are not recommending “blindly”. Each introduction is tracked, logged and documented, with regular touchpoints when needed.

prospects.title: Prospects sent
prospects.text: Clear list of all people you introduced us to, with the key information attached.

contracts.title: Signed contracts
contracts.text: For each prospect, you know if the project was signed, when, and for what amount.

revenue.title: Revenue generated
revenue.text: Tracking of the total revenue generated by your recommendations over the period.

commissions.title: Commissions earned
commissions.text: Clear view of commissions due, upcoming and already paid, with associated records.

rewards.label: Tiers & rewards
rewards.title: A recognition system designed for the long run.
rewards.subtitle: Commissions are the foundation of the program. As you help grow the studio, tiers structure how we recognise your role in that growth.

card.note: Details are shared when you join the program.
card.tier_1_text: You start generating a recurring flow of qualified projects. Each signed engagement is tracked, and your first commissions lay the foundations of the collaboration.
card.tier_2_text: You unlock a premium reward dedicated to the most engaged partners, designed to fit your professional daily life, not as a simple gimmick.
card.tier_3_text: The program becomes a real additional revenue lever. Together we refine tracking, reporting and recognition rules to build a long-term relationship.

list.tier_1_text: You structure your participation in the program and start building a serious additional income.
list.tier_2_text: You join the circle of key partners, with stronger recognition and dedicated benefits.
list.tier_3_text: The program becomes a strategic partnership: detailed tracking, regular check-ins and joint adjustments.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about the Partner Program.
faq.subtitle: If you have more questions, we’ll cover them during our first call. The program’s framework is designed to be clear from day one.

0.question: Who can join the program?
0.answer:
The MC Studio Partner Program is open to anyone with a strong network: independents, freelancers, creatives, sales profiles, agencies, as well as your personal and professional network.

The key: understand our offers, recommend serious and qualified prospects, and maintain a professional posture.

1.question: How does the 10% commission work?
1.answer:
You introduce us to a prospect with a clear need in design, product or application development.
We talk directly with them, scope the need and send a proposal.

If the project is signed, you receive 10% of the total ex‑VAT amount billed on the first engagement (excluding renewals and any recurring subscriptions).

2.question: When is the commission paid?
2.answer:
The commission is paid as soon as the deposit has been received.

In practice, the payment happens right after signature.

3.question: Can I track my referrals and earnings?
3.answer:
Yes. Each partner benefits from a structured tracking system:
- list of prospects sent
- deal status (in progress, signed, not retained)
- amount of signed projects
- associated commissions.

You keep a clear and transparent view of the value you create.

4.question: Are there additional rewards?
4.answer:
Yes. On top of the 10% commission per signed project, we set up a tier system.

For instance, from 10 successful referrals onwards, you unlock a premium reward designed for the most engaged partners.

The goal: build a long-term, win‑win relationship.

cta.title: You have a strong network and want to monetise it smartly?
cta.subtitle: Take 20 minutes to understand exactly how the Partner Program works, see if your profile is a fit and clarify all your questions.
cta.helper: Create your partner account to submit leads and track your commissions.
cta.card_text: Understanding your profile, your network and your expectations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: January 2026
privacy.content:
1. Introduction

Welcome to MC Studio. We respect your privacy and represent that we collect as little data as possible.

2. Data Collection

We may collect personal identification information from Users such as name, email address, phone number when they visit our site, register on the site, place an order, fill out a form, respond to a survey, and in connection with other activities, services, features or resources we make available on our Site.

3. Use of Data

We collect and use Users personal information for the following purposes: To improve customer service, To personalize user experience, To improve our Site, To process payments, To send periodic emails.

4. Contact

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, the practices of this site, or your dealings with this site, please contact us.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Last updated: January 2026
terms.content:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.

2. Services

MC Studio provides design and development services. All services are subject to a separate service agreement.

3. Intellectual Property

The content, organization, graphics, design, compilation, magnetic translation, digital conversion and other matters related to the Site are protected under applicable copyrights, trademarks and other proprietary (including but not limited to intellectual property) rights.

4. Changes

We reserve the right to modify these terms from time to time at our sole discretion.
